links.targetTitle: Swarm manifests form a three-tier hierarchy of user, drive, and document feeds keyed by deterministic keccak256 topics.

global.title: Drive manifest feed indexes drive's documents (with parentFolder) and folder tree
global.description: Drive manifest feed at ph:v2:drive:<driveId> holds per-drive documents map (with documentType, name, parentFolder) and folders map as encrypted JSON.
